name: autocutstudio
description: Automated multi-camera video editing workflow for YouTube content creators

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:electron
scripts.install:electron: cd electron && [ -f package.json ] && npm install || echo 'No electron/package.json found, skipping...'
scripts.clean:python: find cli core -type d -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:python && rm -rf frontend/dist
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && npm run build:preload
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:all && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron --js-flags=--max-old-space-size=8192 .
scripts.start: npm run clean:python && npm run build:all && electron --js-flags=--max-old-space-size=8192 .
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run verify:mac-arm64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run verify:mac-x64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.package:mac: npm run verify:mac-arm64 && npm run verify:mac-x64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --x64
scripts.package:win-x64: npm run verify:win-x64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.package:linux-x64: npm run verify:linux-x64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.package:all: npm run verify:mac-arm64 && npm run verify:mac-x64 && npm run verify:win-x64 && npm run verify:linux-x64 && npm run clean && npm run build:all && electron-builder --mac --win --linux
scripts.clean:package:mac-arm64: npm run download:binaries:mac-arm64 && npm run package:mac-arm64
scripts.clean:package:mac-x64: npm run download:binaries:mac-x64 && npm run package:mac-x64
scripts.clean:package:mac: npm run download:binaries:mac-arm64 && npm run download:binaries:mac-x64 && npm run package:mac
scripts.clean:package:win-x64: npm run download:binaries:win-x64 && npm run package:win-x64
scripts.clean:package:linux-x64: npm run download:binaries:linux-x64 && npm run package:linux-x64
scripts.clean:package:all: npm run download:binaries:all && npm run package:all

author: AutoCutStudio
